/usr/local/vitasdk/bin/arm-vita-eabi-gcc  -Wl,-q -D__vita__ -Wl,-z,nocopyreloc CMakeFiles/alephone.dir/Source_Files/vita_init.c.obj Source_Files/shell.o Source_Files/shell_misc.o Source_Files/shell_options.o Source_Files/main.o -o alephone  -Wl,--allow-multiple-definition -Wl,--start-group Source_Files/CSeries/libcseries.a Source_Files/Files/libfiles.a Source_Files/Videos/libvideos.a Source_Files/GameWorld/libgameworld.a Source_Files/Input/libinput.a Source_Files/Lua/liba1lua.a Source_Files/Misc/libmisc.a Source_Files/ModelView/libmodelview.a Source_Files/Network/libnetwork.a Source_Files/Network/Metaserver/libmetaserver.a Source_Files/RenderMain/librendermain.a Source_Files/RenderOther/librenderother.a Source_Files/Sound/libsound.a Source_Files/TCPMess/libtcpmess.a Source_Files/XML/libxml.a -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSceGxm_stub -lSceDisplay_stub -lSceCtrl_stub -lSceAppMgr_stub -lSceAppUtil_stub -lSceAudio_stub -lSceAudioIn_stub -lSceSysmodule_stub -lSceIofilemgr_stub -lSceCommonDialog_stub -lSceTouch_stub -lSceHid_stub -lSceMotion_stub -lScePower_stub -lSceProcessmgr_stub -lwebpdemux -lwebp -lsharpyuv -lopenal -lSceAudio_stub -lsndfile -lmp3lame -lFLAC -lopus -lmpg123 -lSDL2_ttf -lfreetype -lbz2 -lpng16 -lvorbisenc -lvorbis -logg -lz -lpthread -lm -lboost_filesystem -lboost_system -lstdc++ -Wl,--end-group -lSceAudioIn_stub -lSceSysmodule_stub -lSceIofilemgr_stub -lSceCommonDialog_stub -lSceTouch_stub -lSceHid_stub -lSceMotion_stub -lScePower_stub -lSceProcessmgr_stub -lwebpdemux -lwebp -lsharpyuv -lopenal -lsndfile -lmp3lame -lFLAC -lopus -lmpg123 -lSDL2_ttf -lfreetype -lbz2 -lpng16 -lvorbisenc -lvorbis -logg -lz -lpthread -lm -lboost_filesystem -lboost_system -lstdc++
